hero_subtitle: SFTY gives VASP leadership clear visibility into provider costs and fragmented compliance workflows to reduce operational risk and support scalable audit-ready control.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across siloed providers
problem_description: Leadership teams struggle to gain clear visibility into the costs and performance of fragmented compliance providers. This lack of unified oversight makes it difficult to control expenses, assess operational risk, and drive scalable compliance governance.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates provider outputs, compliance costs, case workflows and audit evidence into a unified dashboard that empowers leadership with transparent oversight and scalable control over digital asset compliance.
workflow_title: From provider costs to compliance insight
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates and organizes provider cost data alongside compliance checks to give executives a clear operational view and risk-informed spending overview.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond provider cost. Clear compliance visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified view of provider costs and compliance workflows, turning fragmented data into clear insights for scalable risk and expense management.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY equips VASP leadership with consolidated compliance workflows, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment for clearer oversight and effective provider cost management.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY provide visibility into compliance provider costs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows reveal multi-provider cost drivers
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence supports tracking provider expenses
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare how SFTY helps leaders control compliance operational costs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY gives executives a connected compliance view to reduce operational risk, improve decision clarity, and strengthen auditability across digital asset workflows and provider outputs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY provide provider cost visibility?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates and structures outputs from multiple compliance providers, enabling leadership to monitor and manage costs linked to onboarding, monitoring and reporting tools from one dashboard.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence to maintain audit readiness, supporting compliance workflows are traceable and defensible during internal and external reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our current compliance stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects seamlessly with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, layering operational workflows without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but consolidates their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports to improve visibility and operational efficiency.
final_title: Bring compliance cost and risk into view
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider cost data with operational workflows to give leadership a clear, auditable compliance overview.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
